creative_brief: Split image: Rachel with cattle in green pastures on left, fresh beef cuts at Brookvale hub on right. Clean, honest photography showing the short journey.
primary_text:
Last Tuesday Rachel from Kempsey told us her cattle travel just 180km to reach Sydney families. Compare that to supermarket beef averaging 2,400km. No wholesalers. No cold storage for weeks. Rachel's regenerative pastures produce beef that reaches our Brookvale hub within days. Order when you want. Collect Monday to Friday.

No middlemen. Sydney families already collect from the Brookvale hub. We can't promise returns, but we can show you everything.
headline: Rachel's beef travels 180km, not 2,400km
description: Be part of the farm-direct grocery movement. Join the waitlist.
